parameters.query: INSERT INTO leads (name, company, industry, email, phone, website, address, rating, icp_score, source, category, country, status) VALUES ('{{$json.name}}', '{{$json.company}}', '{{$json.industry}}', '{{$json.email}}', '{{$json.phone}}', '{{$json.website}}', '{{$json.address}}', {{$json.rating}}, {{$json.icp_score}}, '{{$json.source}}', '{{$json.category}}', '{{$json.country}}', '{{$json.status}}') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING *;
